channel.title: physics.gen-ph updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: physics.gen-ph updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Many Body in General Relativity: A thermal equivalence principle
item.description: arXiv:2606.01389v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We review the physics of many bodies in the context of general relativity. Starting from the stress energy tensor for one body, for a swarm of bodies, for a perfect fluid, we review relativistic hydrodynamics, kinetic theory, and statistical physics of $N$ identical bodies. We conclude our excursion with a thermal equivalence principle in physics.
item.dc:creator: Riccardo Fantoni
